overview: PropFlow is a world-class Real Estate CRM with role-based access for Telecallers, Sales Persons, and Admins. Features dynamic lead management with full status tracking, call history logging, task management, advanced reporting, WhatsApp integration, and mobile/desktop responsive views.
features: Dynamic lead table with status date tracking (Not Connect → SV Done)
Lead status count boxes and aging boxes with click-to-filter
Telecaller dashboard with call log, task management, WhatsApp button
Sales Person dashboard with SV status tracking and lead updates
Admin dashboard with full lead visibility, reports, and task assignment
Advanced reports: Telecaller performance, project summary, monthly trends, conversion funnel
Call history logging with Excel export
Task management with role-based assignment and status updates
Lead Excel download with multi-select filters
Call reminder system for overdue follow-ups
